key.name: prompt
key.default: 'The attached image is a fragment of the user\'s screen. The red ring marks the point the user is interested in. Concisely explain what is shown there and what it means; focus on the marked point but use the rest of the image as context. The user is a native Russian speaker, fluent in English, learning German. Answer in Russian. If the marked content is a German word or phrase, translate and briefly explain it.'

key.name: marker-size
key.summary: Diameter of the red marker ring, px

key.name: marker-glow
key.summary: Glow (box-shadow blur) of the red marker ring, px

key.name: interactive-capture
key.summary: Open the interactive area-selection UI instead of capturing the full screen
